project.title: P. falciparum ookinetes produced by in vitro culture
project.projectDescription: P. falciparum ookinetes were generated by in vitro culture methods and analyzed by DDA LC-MS.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Samples were processed by an SP3 protocol and digested with trypsin. DDA LC-MS was performed on an Orbitrap Eclipse.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw data were converted to mzML with MSConvert version 3.0.19106 Data were searched with Comet version 2024.02 rev0 Search results were analyzed with the Trans-Proteomic Pipeline v7.2.0 running on a Slurm 23.11.4 cluster under Ubuntu 20.04

references.referenceLine: Hatzakis K, MacMillen Z, Kirtley P, Aleshnick M, Martinson T, Gupta P, Swearingen KE, Wilder BK, Davie JW, Avril M. A 3D culture model facilitates mass production of in vitro Plasmodium falciparum haemolymph-like sporozoites. Malar J. 2025 24(1):224

identifiedPTMStrings.name: No PTMs are included in the dataset
